title: SG Shulkerbox
description: A mod to show a preview of the content of a shulker with a customizable keybind
body:
- Using the V key (customizable) while having a shulker on the hand or the cursor over a shulker will show a preview of the content of the shulker (to take or put items in the shulker you still need to put the shulker and open it)
- Shulkers now have a capacity bar like bundles
